text_block_list.text: When I showed up at the track, I happened to run into Victoire Pisa talking with some other Horsegirls.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Oh my! You're inviting me to run alongside you?
The one standing next to Victoire Pisa was… Rose Kingdom. From the prestigious 『Rose Family』 she is one of the most capable Horsegirls of her generation.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: Yes. To reach the heights I aim for, a worthy rival to stand beside me is indispensable. I want you to accept this challenge.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: The conditions are—2400m on turf, assuming the 『Japanese Derby』

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I don't mind. 
Besides, I'm looking forward to running with you, Rose.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks. Also… we have other strong contenders participating. For instance—
If the leading candidates for the upcoming Classic races are gathering, there's no reason to refuse. Watching such a supreme matchup from the sidelines would be—a waste, wouldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Hello, Ruler. It's been three days since we last met at the track.
This is Rulership. She's an intellectual Horsegirl from the same training school as Air Groove, who is known by the alias "Empress".

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text: Heh, to enjoy the ultimate race, the ultimate tactical research is indispensable. Even when we aren't running on the track, the pieces on the board are still moving.

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text: I heard today's mock race gathered the perfect heavyweights to test out my strategies. Then why wouldn't I test if this will be the winning move to dominate the board?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm often surprised by your strategies, Ruler. I'm looking forward to seeing how things unfold.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text:
And there's one more leading candidate. 
…Her.

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text: Could it be Flash? Heh, this is the perfect matchup.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: Yes, however—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must complete my scheduled training menu first. 
As I told Rose, please start at exactly 4:12 PM.

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: —So she says.

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text:
Setting the schedule down to the minute as always. 
But… heh, not bad. Proceeding with things exactly as calculated… is crucial for winning.
Eishin Flash. She is also a leading prospect for the next Classic races. Her composure to seize a momentary chance of victory and her final spurt are said to be a perfect match.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: —Pisa. I've been keeping an eye on your running for a while now. Today, I'll face you with everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe… I'll do my best not to disappoint you♪
Seeing Victoire Pisa surrounded by such a unique cast of characters, a sudden thought crossed my mind. That was—
『To become a king my family can be proud of』 『To dominate the board in every race』 Usually, Horsegirls have clear goals like her rivals do, but—
choice_data_list: <size=38>I feel like she's a bit different.</size>

text_block_list.text: It might partly be due to her soft and gentle aura, but for some reason, it feels like she harbors something different from a clear-cut goal.
But that definitely doesn't mean she's passive toward other Horsegirls, or that she's lagging behind them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Drei… Zwei… Eins—Here I come…! Haaaaaah…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe…♪

text_block_list.name: Rose & Ruler
text_block_list.text: Wh…!?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're good…! I thought I initiated my spurt at the perfect time, but…!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But I'm not done yet…!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That was a very good race. I found some issues of my own to review, so let's do this again if we get the chance.

text_block_list.name: Rulership
text_block_list.text: I ran out of cards… especially my anti-Pisa ones, huh. Haa… I surrender, I surrender. I'm going back to my room to sleep this off…

text_block_list.name: Rose Kingdom
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks. There is always something to gain from battling a worthy rival. This mock race was only meaningful because you agreed to it, Pisa.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad I could be of help. Running with all of you… Nothing makes me happier than this.
—She holds a strong sense of "joy" and "fun" towards running. That much is certain.
However, could a talent praised as one of the most promising in her generation truly blossom this much without a clear sense of purpose?
A few days after the mock race. I happened to run into Victoire Pisa on my way back from shopping.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Something you want to ask me…?
choice_data_list: <size=38>Yeah, but it's fine if it's too hard to answer</size>
<size=38>Yeah, but it's fine if it's too hard to answer</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
choice_data_list: <size=26>I want you to tell me what you want to achieve through running</size>
<size=26>I want you to tell me what you want to achieve through running</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…What I want to achieve…? 
Let's see. I just—

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't there smoke coming from the alleyway…? 
Is it… a fire?
